scripts.build: mkdir -p lib/ffmpeg && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/index.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg@0.12.6/dist/esm/index.js && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/worker.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg@0.12.6/dist/esm/worker.js && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/const.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg@0.12.6/dist/esm/const.js && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/errors.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/ffmpeg@0.12.6/dist/esm/errors.js && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/util.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/util@0.12.1/dist/esm/index.js && curl -fsSL -o lib/ffmpeg/ffmpeg-core.js https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@ffmpeg/core@0.12.6/dist/esm/ffmpeg-core.js
